title: Argon Tableware Square Glass Oven Dishes - 24cm x 21cm - 2x Small Deep Baking Casserole Lasagne Roasting Roaster Cooking Tray Bowl | Microwave Safe, Freezer Safe
features: Whether cooking in the comfort of your own kitchen or amidst the hustle and bustle of a professional restaurant, these Square Glass Oven Dishes from Argon Tableware will prove to be an essential and indispensable part of your culinary arsenal!

Made from borosilicate glass, these dishes boast exceptional resistance to both extreme temperatures and thermal shock, allowing you to transfer from the fridge or freezer to the oven or microwave with ease. The BPA-free material ensures no nasties, while a scratch and stain-resistant finish means your dishes will stay looking clean and pristine for years to come.

The classic square dish shape provides a versatile vessel for cooking cottage pie, lasagne, roasted meats or vegetables and more, with two sizes on offer catering for solo meals, date nights and family gatherings alike.
As a final finishing touch, each dish comes with a moulded handle on either side for easy gripping and fuss-free movement from surface to appliance to table and back again.
